name: identity-v2 cache-key mismatch defeats session supplementary cache
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L1-02] getOrLoadSessionSupplementary and the homework/book context wrappers recompute the cache key WITHOUT the identityV2Enabled suffix, so under identity-v2 the lookup misses and supplementary is never written back (re-runs 5-query fan-out every exchange). Fix: thread identityV2Enabled into getSessionStaticContextCacheKey in all three wrappers.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: apps/api/src/services/session/session-cache.ts supports identity-v2-specific cache keys, but getOrLoadSessionSupplementary plus the homework/book static-context wrappers call getSessionStaticContextCacheKey without forwarding identityV2Enabled, so identity-v2 reads miss the intended key and re-run the supplementary fan-out. Variants: (a) supplementary session context, (b) homework context wrapper, (c) book context wrapper; each must use the same idv2/legacy key split as the primary static-context cache. Regression test: apps/api/src/services/session/session-cache.test.ts fails without the fix and passes with it, proving identity-v2 calls hit/write the idv2 key for all three wrappers while legacy keys still work.
